headline: Russia unleashes massive drone and missile barrage on Kyiv
subheadline: Over 50 rockets and hundreds of Shahed drones struck Kyiv from multiple directions, while guided bombs hit Sumy and Kharkiv suffered museum damage.
lede: Israel activated red alerts across five northern sectors and struck a Hezbollah command centre in Beirut after missile launches toward its territory. Iranian officials warned of possible missile retaliation. In Ukraine, more than 50 rockets and hundreds of Shahed drones bombarded Kyiv from the north, east and south, overwhelming air defenses. Simultaneous guided aerial bombings hit Sumy and a museum in Kharkiv was damaged, injuring civilians.

sections.title: Coordinated aerial onslaught overwhelms Kyiv defenses
sections.body: Shahed drones approached Kyiv from the east, north‑east and south‑west, while cruise missiles arrived from the north‑east, north and south. Large formations of attack UAVs were also observed moving toward the capital from Chernihiv, Cherkasy and northern routes. Russian tactical aviation dropped guided aerial bombs on Sumy, and the Kharkiv Art Museum suffered damage, injuring civilians including an infant.

sections.title: Israel strikes Beirut command amid rising alerts
sections.body: Red alerts were issued for hostile aircraft across the Menachem, Zarit, Shomera, Shtula and Tzofar sectors in northern Israel. A suspect aerial target fell near the Israel‑Lebanon border with no casualties, and similar alerts were pending in southern areas. The IDF carried out a precise strike on a Hezbollah command centre in Beirut, targeting infrastructure used for attacks. Large numbers of drones were observed over villages in southern Lebanon, and Iranian officials warned of possible missile retaliation.

sections.title: Intelligence Assessment
sections.body: Both theatres show a pattern of multi‑vector aerial attacks designed to stretch opponent defenses and signal escalation readiness. Israel's cross‑border strike and Iran's missile threat raise the risk of broader regional retaliation, while Russia's coordinated drone‑missile barrage indicates an intensified effort to degrade Ukrainian command and civilian infrastructure.
